programme.desc: אנימציה. דוב פנדה, מגלה נבואה עתיקה לפיה הוא צריך להצטרף לחבורת הלוחמים "החמישייה הזועמת", שמטרתה להגן על יושבי העמק בו הם חיים. במאים: מארק אוסבורן וג'ון סטיבנסון. 2008. כ' עב'.

programme.title: משפחה בהחלפה (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה. במשפחה זו לכל אחד צרות משלו. ההורים שקועים בעבודות משעממות וכושלות, פיי הבכורה מתאהבת בקלות ומקס החנון סובל מהצקות בבית הספר. חיי המשפחה משתנים כשהם מחליטים לערוך מסיבת תחפושות. במאי: הולגר טאפה, 2017. כ' עב'.

programme.title: הדרקון הראשון שלי (מדובב)
programme.desc: היקאפ הצעיר מנסה להרשים את אביו ולהגן על כפרו מדרקונים. כשיום אחד הוא מגלה דרקון צעיר, מתפתחת בין השניים חברות מקסימה שמובילה את הכפר לעתיד טוב יותר. במאי: דין דה-בלויס. 2010. כ' עב'.

programme.title: להציל את החווה (מדובב)
programme.desc: דרמת הרפתקאות מרגשת ומצחיקה. אנני וחברה הטוב ביותר - הכלב ראנט יוצאים לתחרות כלבים באנגליה במטרה להציל את החווה המשפחתית באוסטרליה, רק שראנט מאוד ביישן... עם: לילי לה טורה. דיבוב: אמלי קקון סלונים. אוסטרליה/אנגליה, 2024.

programme.title: ביגפוט ג'וניור 2 (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציית הרפתקאות לכל המשפחה. מספר חודשים לאחר שחזר לביתו, מחליט ביגפוט לעזוב שוב את בנו אדם ולצאת להציל עמק באלסקה מתאגיד דלק אכזרי. כשהוא נעלם באורח מסתורי, יוצא אדם למסע חיפושים אחר אביו. 2020. כ' עב'.

programme.title: העי"ג (ענק ידידותי גדול)
programme.desc: סרט ההרפתקאות המקסים שביים סטיבן ספילברג עפ"י ספרו של רואלד דאל. לילה אחד מגיע לחלונה של סופי בת ה-10 בבית יתומים יצור ענק. למרות החשש הראשוני, היא מצטרפת לענק הידידותי למסע קסום. עם: רבקה הול, מארק ריילנס. קנדה, 2016.

programme.title: השידורים יתחדשו בקרוב
programme.desc: השידורים יתחדשו בקרוב.

programme.title: השידורים יתחדשו בקרוב
programme.desc: השידורים יתחדשו בקרוב.

programme.title: מרוץ החיות הגדול (מדובב)
programme.desc: הרפתקה במהירות גבוהה. קופיף איטי שאוהב לקחת את הזמן, מחליט להירשם לתחרות של מירוץ מכוניות. מטרתו היא לזכות בפרס הראשון, כך יוכל להציל את ביתה של סבתו שנמצא בסכנה. קולות: קובי ליקורמן, ספיר דרמון. במאי: רוס ונוקור, 2023.

programme.title: מלכת השלג והנסיכה (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציית הרפתקאות נפלאה. בתה של מלכת השלג משחררת בטעות את רוחות הקרח שמקפיאות את העיירה. כדי לתקן את המצב עליה לצאת למסע מסוכן מלא אומץ וקסם. דיבוב: דניאל מגון, אלונה אלכסנדר. רוסיה, 2022. כ' עב'.

programme.title: פנדה קטן גדול (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה. קהילת הפנדות נמצאת בסכנת הכחדה וזקוקה לגיבור שיוביל אותה לעתיד טוב. מנצ'ו, פנדה קטן ואמיץ במיוחד, יוצא למסע ביער הגדול, שם הוא פוגש חברים שיעזרו לו להציל את היער. במאים: גרג מנוורינג ומייקל שומן. 2011. כ' עב'.

programme.title: כלבים באופרה (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה. כלב רחוב אמיץ נמלט מלוכדי כלבים ונקלע לאולם אופרה אגדי, שם הוא פוגש את כלבתה האלגנטית של בלרינה נוצצת. יחד הם יוצאים להרפתקה נועזת להשבת תכשיט גנוב. דיבוב: רז וקנין. במאי: וסילי רובנסקי. רוסיה, 2023. מדובב לעב'.

programme.title: בית (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה מקסימה על חייזר קצת מוזר ומאוד שמח, שבאופן מפתיע מתיידד עם ילדה מכדור הארץ. אירועים שונים מובילים את השניים למסע משותף במכונית מעופפת. דיבוב עברית: גלעד שמואלי, קטי כהן. במאי: טים ג'ונסון. 2015. כ' עב'.

programme.title: הקרודים (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה. משפחת הקרודים הקדמונית תמיד נשארה במערה הבטוחה שלה. לאחר שהמערה נהרסת, הקרודים נחשפים לראשונה לנוף מרהיב ועולם חדש ומופלא. קולות: דקלה הדר, לירון לב, רבקה מיכאלי. במאים: קירק דה-מיקו, כריס סנדרס. 2013. כ' עב'.

programme.title: משפחה בהחלפה (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה. במשפחה זו לכל אחד צרות משלו. ההורים שקועים בעבודות משעממות וכושלות, פיי הבכורה מתאהבת בקלות ומקס החנון סובל מהצקות בבית הספר. חיי המשפחה משתנים כשהם מחליטים לערוך מסיבת תחפושות. במאי: הולגר טאפה, 2017. כ' עב'.

programme.title: שרק לנצח (מדובב)
programme.desc: שרק וחבריו חוזרים להרפתקה חדשה! כשהוא משועמם מחייו, שרק עושה עסקה עם ננס מרושע, ונשאב לעולם מעוות בו פיונה וחבריו מעולם לא נפגשו. כעת שרק עושה הכל כדי להחזיר את העולם לקדמותו. במאי: מייק מיטשל. כ' עב'.

programme.title: פליימוביל: הסרט (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציית הרפתקאות לכל המשפחה. מרלה ואחיה הצעיר צ'ארלי נשאבים בטעות לעולם בובות הפליימוביל. לאחר שצ'ארלי נחטף ע"י ויקינגים, יוצאת מרלה למסע הצלה נועז. עם: אניה טיילור ג'וי. דיבוב: עדי בר לב. במאי: לינו דיסלבו. 2019. כ' עב'.

programme.title: סוניק - הסרט 2 (מדובב)
programme.desc: הקיפוד האהוב והמהיר בעולם חוזר בהרפתקה משודרגת! סוניק נאלץ להתמודד מול נאקלס, אויב עוצמתי מהכוכב שלו, שעוזר לד"ר רובוטניק הרשע להשיג אבן איזמרגד משמידת עולמות. עם: ג'ים קארי. דיבוב: לירון לב. במאי: ג'ף פאולר. 2022 כ' עב'.

programme.title: להציל את החווה (מדובב)
programme.desc: דרמת הרפתקאות מרגשת ומצחיקה. אנני וחברה הטוב ביותר - הכלב ראנט יוצאים לתחרות כלבים באנגליה במטרה להציל את החווה המשפחתית באוסטרליה, רק שראנט מאוד ביישן... עם: לילי לה טורה. דיבוב: אמלי קקון סלונים. אוסטרליה/אנגליה, 2024.

programme.title: שיר הים
programme.desc: סרט אנימציה יפהפייה, שהיה מועמד לאוסקר. סירשה בת השש היא נצר ליצורים מופלאים. כשסבתה לוקחת אותה ואת אחיה הגדול לעיר, הם בורחים ויוצאים להרפתקאה להציל את עולם הפיות והיצורים הקסומים. עם: ברנדן גליסון. במאי: טום מור, 2014.

programme.title: השידורים יתחדשו בקרוב
programme.desc: השידורים יתחדשו בקרוב.(c)

programme.title: השידורים יתחדשו בקרוב
programme.desc: השידורים יתחדשו בקרוב.(c)

programme.title: לעוף על הזמן (מדובב)
programme.desc: קומדיית אנימציה. שני תרנגולי הודו יריבים יוצאים יחד למסע בזמן כדי לשנות את מהלך ההיסטוריה. דיבוב עברית: אלי פיניש, מריאנו אידלמן. במאי: ג'ימי הייווארד. ארה"ב, 2013. כ' עב'.(c)

programme.title: מסביב לעולם ב-80 יום (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציית הרפתקאות בעיבוד מחודש לקלאסיקה של ז'ול וורן. קופיף צעיר ומלומד יוצא להרפתקה פראית מסביב לעולם ב-80 יום, לאחר שקיבל אתגר מצפרדע כריזמטי וחד לשון. דיבוב: יולי סקר, גילן שחף. במאי: סמואל תורנו. צרפת, 2021.(c)

programme.title: מרוץ החיות הגדול (מדובב)
programme.desc: הרפתקה במהירות גבוהה. קופיף איטי שאוהב לקחת את הזמן, מחליט להירשם לתחרות של מירוץ מכוניות. מטרתו היא לזכות בפרס הראשון, כך יוכל להציל את ביתה של סבתו שנמצא בסכנה. קולות: קובי ליקורמן, ספיר דרמון. במאי: רוס ונוקור, 2023.(c)

programme.title: מבצע קוקוריקו (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציית הרפתקאות. כשאספן ביצים חמדן חוטף את ביצי התרנגולים, אולי ומקס, ולוקח אותם לאפריקה כדי להפוך אותם לארוחה, ההורים המודאגים שלהם טסים לקצה השני של העולם לפני שיהיה מאוחר מדי. דיבוב: דן קיזלר, נועה לפידות. 2021. כ' עב'.(c)

programme.title: שרק (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה זוכת פרס אוסקר. מפלצת ירוקה ורגזנית, חמור פטפטן ונסיכה יפהפייה יוצאים לעזור לגיבורי האגדות, שסולקו מאדמתם ע"י שליט רשע. במאים: אנדרו אדמסון, ויקי ג'ונסון. ארה"ב, 2001. כ' עב'.(c)

programme.title: בלש על שמונה (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה לכל המשפחה. המפקח סאן הוא בלש-עכביש אשר פותר תעלומות בלתי פתורות בעולם החרקים. כשהוא עולה על מטוס לחופשה, הוא מגלה כי בטיסה מתבצע פשע בעל השלכות לא רק על עולם החרקים, אלא גם על בני האדם. דיבוב עב': גדי לוי. 2022.(c)

programme.title: הקוסם מארץ עוץ (מדובב)
programme.desc: פנטזיה מהנה לכל המשפחה. גרסא חדשנית מרהיבה אודות הרפתקעותיהם של אלי וחבריה בארץ עוץ. בעזרת חכמה, אומץ וידידות הם יגיעו לעיר הברקת בתקווה שהקוסם יגשים את משאלותיהם. עם: יורי קולוקולניקוב. רוסיה, 2025.(c)

programme.title: מדגסקר 2 (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה. המשך עלילותיהם של תושבי גן החיות הניו יורקי שננטשו על האי מדגסקר. אלכס האריה, מרטי הזברה, מלמן הג'ירפה, וגלוריה ההיפופוטם - מחליטים לעזוב את האי ומגיעים לאפריקה! במאי: אריק דארנל. 2008. כ' עב'.(c)

programme.title: הכלב והחתולה: המרדף המטורף (מדובב)
programme.desc: קומדיה לכל המשפחה בדיבוב אמיר שורוש ("ראמזי") ומיקי מוכתר עורי. גור כלבים שבלע יהלום יקר וחתולה מפונקת נפגשים במקרה לאחר שנשכחו בשדה התעופה. כעת עליהם למצוא דרך לחזור לבעליהם, בעוד אחריהם רודף שוטר שמחפש אחר היהלום. 2024.(c)

programme.title: ביגפוט ג'וניור 2 (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציית הרפתקאות לכל המשפחה. מספר חודשים לאחר שחזר לביתו, מחליט ביגפוט לעזוב שוב את בנו אדם ולצאת להציל עמק באלסקה מתאגיד דלק אכזרי. כשהוא נעלם באורח מסתורי, יוצא אדם למסע חיפושים אחר אביו. 2020. כ' עב'.(c)

programme.title: רובין וילדי היער
programme.desc: הרפתקאה משוגעת לכל המשפחה. רובין וחבריה אוהבים לשחק במשחקי דמיון ביער שליד ביתם. כשיזמית נדל"ן מרושעת מתכננת להרוס את היער ולבנות במקומו בניינים, החבורה יעשו הכול כדי לשמור על הטבע. במאי: פיל הוקינס. אנגליה, 2024.(c)

programme.title: עם הזרם
programme.desc: אנימציה אילמת נוגעת ללב, זוכת האוסקר לסרט האנימציה הטוב ביותר. כשביתו נהרס בשיטפון גדול, חתול מתבודד מוצא מפלט בסירה המאוכלסת על ידי חיות שונות, שייאלצו ללמוד לעבוד יחד כדי לשרוד, למרות ההבדלים הברורים בטבעם. לטביה, 2024.(c)

programme.title: השידורים יתחדשו בקרוב
programme.desc: השידורים יתחדשו בקרוב.(n)

programme.title: השידורים יתחדשו בקרוב
programme.desc: השידורים יתחדשו בקרוב.(n)

programme.title: דייזי קווא-קה (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציית הרפתקאות. לדייזי, חיית כיס קטנה, יש חלום אחד גדול - לנצח בתחרות החיה המסוכנת בעולם. היא חוברת לאלוף לשעבר, תנין מים מלוחים נרגן, כדי להוכיח שאלופים מגיעים בכל הגדלים! דיבוב: נעמה שטרית. במאי: ריצר'ד קוסו, 2021.(n)

programme.title: מבצע קוקוריקו (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציית הרפתקאות. כשאספן ביצים חמדן חוטף את ביצי התרנגולים, אולי ומקס, ולוקח אותם לאפריקה כדי להפוך אותם לארוחה, ההורים המודאגים שלהם טסים לקצה השני של העולם לפני שיהיה מאוחר מדי. דיבוב: דן קיזלר, נועה לפידות. 2021. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.title: חלום של רובוט
programme.desc: אנימציה מרגשת לכל המשפחה. רובוט וכלב הם החברים הכי טובים שחיים בניו יורק התוססת של שנות ה-80. לאחר בילוי בחוף, רובוט הופך לחלוד וכלב נאלץ להשאיר אותו מאחור, לחלום על הזמן שבילו יחד. במאי: פבלו ברגר. ספרד, 2023. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.title: בייבי בוס 2: עסק משפחתי (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה, המשך לסרט שובר הקופות. טד תינוק הפלא ואחיו טים, היום אנשים בוגרים, נאלצים לשתף פעולה כדי להציל את ילדי העולם מפני גאון מרושע. לשם כך בתו של טים, תינוקת פלא בעצמה, הופכת אותם שוב לילדים. 2021. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.title: בלש על שמונה (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה לכל המשפחה. המפקח סאן הוא בלש-עכביש אשר פותר תעלומות בלתי פתורות בעולם החרקים. כשהוא עולה על מטוס לחופשה, הוא מגלה כי בטיסה מתבצע פשע בעל השלכות לא רק על עולם החרקים, אלא גם על בני האדם. דיבוב עב': גדי לוי. 2022.(n)

programme.title: משפחה בהחלפה (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה. במשפחה זו לכל אחד צרות משלו. ההורים שקועים בעבודות משעממות וכושלות, פיי הבכורה מתאהבת בקלות ומקס החנון סובל מהצקות בבית הספר. חיי המשפחה משתנים כשהם מחליטים לערוך מסיבת תחפושות. במאי: הולגר טאפה, 2017. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.title: חברים עד השמיים! (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציית הרפתקאות מקסימה. תקרית לא צפויה שולחת עכברה מלאת בטחון וגור שועלים ביישן, אל גן העדן. שם היריבות ביניהם כבר לא נראית חשובה וידידות אמת נרקמת. דיבוב: לירון לב, ספיר דרמון. במאים: דניסה גרימובה, יאן בובניצ'ק. 2021.(n)

programme.title: מפחידונת (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה כיפית לכל המשפחה! נערה נועזת עם רטייה וזרוע תמנון נאלצת להתמודד עם פחדיה ולצאת למסע לעיר האורות כדי להציל את אביה ולמנוע את הרס עולמה. דיבוב עב': נופר אליהו, ניר ברק. במאי: קוקי סלינס. אוסטרליה, 2023. מדובב לעב'.(n)

programme.title: המופלאה: הרפתקאות ליידי באג (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציית הרפתקאות על פי הסדרה האהובה. שני מתבגרים פריזאיים הופכים לגיבורי-העל "חיפושית" ו"חתול שחור", כדי להגן על העיר מפני כוחות הרשע של עש הלילה, הנבל המרושע. דיבוב עב': ספיר דרמון. במאי: ז'רמי זג. צרפת, 2023.(n)

programme.title: חלום של רובוט
programme.desc: אנימציה מרגשת לכל המשפחה. רובוט וכלב הם החברים הכי טובים שחיים בניו יורק התוססת של שנות ה-80. לאחר בילוי בחוף, רובוט הופך לחלוד וכלב נאלץ להשאיר אותו מאחור, לחלום על הזמן שבילו יחד. במאי: פבלו ברגר. ספרד, 2023. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.title: בייבי בוס 2: עסק משפחתי
programme.desc: אנימציה, המשך לסרט שובר הקופות. טד ואחיו הגדול טים, היום אנשים בוגרים, נאלצים לשתף פעולה כדי להציל את ילדי העולם מפני גאון מרושע. לשם כך בתו של טים, תינוקת פלא בעצמה, הופכת אותם שוב לילדים. דיבוב: אלק בולדווין. 2021.(n)

programme.title: רובין וילדי היער
programme.desc: הרפתקאה משוגעת לכל המשפחה. רובין וחבריה אוהבים לשחק במשחקי דמיון ביער שליד ביתם. כשיזמית נדל"ן מרושעת מתכננת להרוס את היער ולבנות במקומו בניינים, החבורה יעשו הכול כדי לשמור על הטבע. במאי: פיל הוקינס. אנגליה, 2024.(n)

programme.title: Babylon
programme.desc: A Rastafarian garage mechanic in a tough London neighbourhood heads up a mobile DJ crew and prepares to compete in a sound-systems competition. However, he has to contend with racism, violence and crime, and his life begins to unravel as he loses his job, is harassed by the police under stop-and-search laws and has his equipment destroyed by angry neighbours. Drama, with Brinsley Forde and Karl Howman.(n)

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: A retired boxer returns to the ring for one last shot at the title, but must embark on an illegal weight cut programme first. Sports thriller, starring Orlando Bloom, Caitriona Balfe and John Turturro.(n)

programme.title: The Good Half
programme.desc: Returning home for his mother's funeral, Renn Wheeland forges new relationships and heals old ones as he faces his grief. Drama, starring Nick Jonas, David Arquette and Brittany Snow.(n)

programme.title: Molly's Game
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about Molly Bloom, an Olympic-class skier who ran the world's most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested in the middle of the night by FBI agents wielding automatic weapons. Her players included Hollywood royalty, sports stars, business titans and finally - unbeknownst to her - the Russian Mob. Directed by The West Wing creator Aaron Sorkin, and starring Jessica Chastain, Idris Elba and Kevin Costner.(n)

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: A middle-class family take in a hulking homeless teenager, who has no education or skills to speak of. The indomitable wife encourages him to turn his life around, helping him to get the grades he needs for a college scholarship and hone his sporting skills to become an American football player. Fact-based drama, starring an Oscar-winning Sandra Bullock alongside Quinton Aaron and Tim McGraw.(n)

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. During a depressing night in the hotel bar, he meets a spirited younger woman and the pair strike up a close friendship, exploring Tokyo and helping each other face the mundanities of everyday life. Sofia Coppola's comedy drama, starring Bill Murray, Scarlett Johansson and Giovanni Ribisi.(n)

programme.title: Babylon
programme.desc: A Rastafarian garage mechanic in a tough London neighbourhood heads up a mobile DJ crew and prepares to compete in a sound-systems competition. However, he has to contend with racism, violence and crime, and his life begins to unravel as he loses his job, is harassed by the police under stop-and-search laws and has his equipment destroyed by angry neighbours. Drama, with Brinsley Forde and Karl Howman.(n)

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: A retired boxer returns to the ring for one last shot at the title, but must embark on an illegal weight cut programme first. Sports thriller, starring Orlando Bloom, Caitriona Balfe and John Turturro.(n)

programme.title: Empire of the Sun
programme.desc: An English boy living in Shanghai is separated from his parents during the Japanese invasion and forced to live on the streets. The youngster is befriended by an American sailor, who helps the boy adapt to life without his family, before the pair are eventually captured and subjected to the terrors of internment. Steven Spielberg's Second World War drama based on JG Ballard's semi-autobiographical novel, starring Christian Bale, John Malkovich and Nigel Havers.(n)

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: A Navy recruit undergoing officer training has an uneasy romance with a factory worker. He also attracts the attention of a tough, uncompromising sergeant, who sees his potential and is determined to push him to the limit. Romantic drama, starring Richard Gere, Debra Winger, Louis Gossett Jr, Robert Loggia, David Keith and David Caruso.(n)

programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: A grizzled drifter rescues a nun from a gang of rapists and gets roped into escorting her across the Mexican desert. He gradually realises there is more to his new companion than meets the eye - and she may be hiding a surprising secret. Don Siegel's Western, starring Clint Eastwood, Shirley MacLaine, Manolo Fabregas, Alberto Morin and John Kelly.(n)

programme.title: The Damned United
programme.desc: Fact-based drama chronicling Brian Clough's ill-fated 44-day tenure as boss of Leeds United in 1974, after Don Revie's departure for the job of England's manager. Following his acrimonious split from Derby County and a brief spell at Brighton \u0026 Hove Albion, Clough arrived at Elland Road on a wave of controversy, after previously being an outspoken critic of the club, and struggled to find allies among the playing staff. With Michael Sheen, Timothy Spall, Jim Broadbent and Colm Meaney.(n)

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Following a gig, fading music star Jackson Maine happens upon Ally, a nightclub singer-songwriter. Their instant chemistry leads to a tempestuous romance as he helps her on the road to stardom. However, Jackson's alcoholism has explosive repercussions as her career blossoms. Oscar-winning drama, starring Lady Gaga, Bradley Cooper, who also directed, and Sam Elliott.(n)

programme.title: Burning an Illusion
programme.desc: A black woman living in West London hopes to marry her boyfriend, but finds her life thrown into upheaval when he loses his job and is subsequently arrested after getting into a fight. The experience makes her reassess her priorities, and she decides to reconnect with her African heritage. Drama, starring Cassie McFarlane and Victor Romero Evans.(n)

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: A Navy recruit undergoing officer training has an uneasy romance with a factory worker. He also attracts the attention of a tough, uncompromising sergeant, who sees his potential and is determined to push him to the limit. Romantic drama, starring Richard Gere, Debra Winger, Louis Gossett Jr, Robert Loggia, David Keith and David Caruso.(n)

programme.title: Empire of the Sun

The youngster is befriended by an American sailor, who helps the boy adapt to life without his family, before the pair are eventually captured and subjected to the terrors of internment. Steven Spielberg's Second World War drama based on JG Ballard's semi-autobiographical novel, starring Christian Bale, John Malkovich and Nigel Havers.(n)

programme.title: The Damned United
programme.desc: Fact-based drama chronicling Brian Clough's ill-fated 44-day tenure as boss of Leeds United in 1974, after Don Revie's departure for the job of England's manager. Following his acrimonious split from Derby County and a brief spell at Brighton \u0026 Hove Albion, Clough arrived at Elland Road on a wave of controversy, after previously being an outspoken critic of the club, and struggled to find allies among the playing staff. With Michael Sheen, Timothy Spall, Jim Broadbent and Colm Meaney.(n)

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom returns to her childhood home of Plethora, Maine, to attend the funeral of her father, the former town mayor who beat his wife behind closed doors. Upon returning to Boston, Lily is attracted to Ryle Kincaid, a neurosurgeon with a dark side, and old flame Atlas Corrigan. Drama based on the bestselling novel, starring Blake Lively, Justin Baldoni, Jenny Slate and Brandon Sklenar.(n)

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Following a gig, fading music star Jackson Maine happens upon Ally, a nightclub singer-songwriter. Their instant chemistry leads to a tempestuous romance as he helps her on the road to stardom. However, Jackson's alcoholism has explosive repercussions as her career blossoms. Oscar-winning drama, starring Lady Gaga, Bradley Cooper, who also directed, and Sam Elliott.(n)

programme.title: Nuremberg
programme.desc: A US Army psychiatrist is sent to assess high-ranking Nazi prisoners - most notably Hermann Göring - to decide if they're fit for trial. As the Nuremberg trials begin, he becomes enmeshed in a psychological and legal battle. Director James Vanderbilt's thriller, starring Russell Crowe, Rami Malek and Leo Woodall.(n)

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: Ice skater Tonya Harding rises through the ranks at the US figure skating championships, but her future in the sport is thrown into question by a shocking incident after her ex-husband steps in. Director Craig Gillespie's comedy biopic, starring Margot Robbie, Sebastian Stan, and Allison Janney, who won a Bafta and an Oscar for her performance.(n)

programme.title: American Sniper
programme.desc: A Navy Seal becomes a legend to his colleagues thanks to his skills as a deadly sniper. On his return to the US following four tours of duty in Iraq, he finds living an ordinary life as a husband and father far more difficult to deal with than the demands of warfare. Biopic based on the experiences of real-life Iraq conflict veteran Chris Kyle, directed by Clint Eastwood and starring Bradley Cooper, Sienna Miller and Kyle Gallner.

programme.title: Burning an Illusion
programme.desc: A black woman living in West London hopes to marry her boyfriend, but finds her life thrown into upheaval when he loses his job and is subsequently arrested after getting into a fight. The experience makes her reassess her priorities, and she decides to reconnect with her African heritage. Drama, starring Cassie McFarlane and Victor Romero Evans.

programme.title: Five Easy Pieces
programme.desc: An oil-rigger who has cut himself off from his cultured, middle-class roots reluctantly returns to his family home, with his pregnant girlfriend in tow, after receiving word that his father is dying. However, the homecoming turns into a failure, as the psychological journey has a lasting impact on himself and those closest to him. Drama, with Jack Nicholson, Karen Black, Susan Anspach and Ralph Waite.

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: Two students at Harvard University fall in love, but their romance is fated to be cut tragically short by the discovery that one of them has a terminal illness. Romantic drama, starring Ali MacGraw, Ryan O'Neal and Ray Milland.

programme.title: Let's Dance
programme.desc: A singing and dancing war widow tries to shield her son from her husband's interfering wealthy parents by absconding to New York, where she is reunited with her former showbiz partner. They resurrect their old dance act, while her in-laws begin a campaign to claim custody of their grandchild. Musical, starring Fred Astaire, Betty Hutton, Roland Young and Ruth Warrick.

programme.title: The Boy in the Striped Pyjamas
programme.desc: Bruno, a boy in Nazi Germany, moves to the country when his father is placed in charge of a concentration camp. While exploring the woods close to the facility's boundary, he spots a Jewish youngster being held there, and the two become friends - but Bruno remains innocently oblivious to the camp's true purpose. Drama, starring David Thewlis, Asa Butterfield and Jack Scanlon.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: Ice skater Tonya Harding rises through the ranks at the US figure skating championships, but her future in the sport is thrown into question by a shocking incident after her ex-husband steps in. Director Craig Gillespie's comedy biopic, starring Margot Robbie, Sebastian Stan, and Allison Janney, who won a Bafta and an Oscar for her performance.

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married
programme.desc: A depressed fortysomething woman about to get divorced faints at a high-school reunion and awakes to find she has travelled back in time to her teenage years. Given the chance to put things right, she resolves to avoid a relationship with the man she is about to divorce. Comedy, starring Kathleen Turner, Nicolas Cage, Maureen O'Sullivan, Joan Allen, Catherine Hicks and Kevin J O'Connor.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: A woman supports her daughter despite their differences over three tumultuous decades. The indomitable matriarch disapproves of her daughter's marriage and finds grandmotherhood hard to get used to, but is fiercely protective of her family when tragedy strikes. Oscar-winning drama, starring Shirley MacLaine, Debra Winger, Jack Nicholson, Danny DeVito and Jeff Daniels.

programme.title: Escape to Victory
programme.desc: Allied PoWs take to the football field when a group of Nazi officers comes up with the idea to have them take on a German team for a propaganda event. However, the prisoners see a chance to escape during the match. Second World War adventure, with Michael Caine, Sylvester Stallone, Max von Sydow and Daniel Massey. Soccer legends also making appearances include Pele, Bobby Moore and Ossie Ardiles.

programme.title: The King's Speech
programme.desc: The younger son of George V struggles to cope with an uncontrollable stammer, prompting his wife to enlist the aid of an eccentric Australian speech therapist. The support and friendship of the doctor prove invaluable when a crisis places the repressed prince on the throne, just as the outbreak of the Second World War leaves the country in need of a strong king. Oscar-winning fact-based drama, starring Colin Firth, Geoffrey Rush, Helena Bonham Carter and Guy Pearce.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: When a couple flee Europe in 1947, their new lives in the US are changed by a strange client. Director Brady Corbet's drama, starring Adrien Brody, Felicity Jones, Guy Pearce and Joe Alwyn.

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke
programme.desc: A rebellious small-time crook is sent to a prison in the Deep South, where he becomes a hero in the eyes of his fellow convicts and a thorn in the sides of the warden and the guards by refusing to bow to authority. His defiance escalates when he receives news of his mother's death, and embarks on a series of failed escape attempts. Drama based on Donn Pearce's novel, starring Paul Newman, George Kennedy, JD Cannon and Dennis Hopper.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: A woman supports her daughter despite their differences over three tumultuous decades. The indomitable matriarch disapproves of her daughter's marriage and finds grandmotherhood hard to get used to, but is fiercely protective of her family when tragedy strikes. programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: Two students at Harvard University fall in love, but their romance is fated to be cut tragically short by the discovery that one of them has a terminal illness. Romantic drama, starring Ali MacGraw, Ryan O'Neal and Ray Milland.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: A teenager strives to be a good daughter, a good friend and a good student - all while navigating an endless barrage of invasive, obsessive thoughts that she cannot control. When she reconnects with her childhood crush, she is confronted with fundamental questions about her potential for love, happiness, friendship and hope - all while trying to solve a mystery surrounding a fugitive billionaire. Romantic drama, starring Isabela Merced, Cree and Judy Reyes.

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married
programme.desc: A depressed fortysomething woman about to get divorced faints at a high-school reunion and awakes to find she has travelled back in time to her teenage years. programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: A single man gets the chance to turn his unhappy life around when his father reveals that they both have the ability to travel through time and change their personal history. He uses his newfound talent to try to improve his love life and win the heart of an American woman he has fallen for. Romantic fantasy comedy, with Domhnall Gleeson, Rachel McAdams and Bill Nighy.

Fact-based drama, starring an Oscar-winning Sandra Bullock alongside Quinton Aaron and Tim McGraw.

programme.title: No Escape
programme.desc: An American takes a job in an Asian nation and relocates his family overseas. However, no sooner do they arrive then a revolution takes the country by storm. They face a struggle for survival as the new government seeks to eliminate all foreigners. Action thriller, starring Owen Wilson, Pierce Brosnan and Lake Bell.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: May 1940. As the Nazis advance against Britain's European allies, newly elected prime minister Winston Churchill must decide whether to leave neighbouring countries to their fate, by striking a peace deal with Hitler, or fight on against terrifying odds for the greater good. Double Oscar and Bafta-winning period drama, starring Gary Oldman, Lily James and Kristin Scott Thomas.

programme.title: American Sniper

The indomitable wife encourages him to turn his life around, helping him to get the grades he needs for a college scholarship and hone his sporting skills to become an American football player. Fact-based drama, starring an Oscar-winning Sandra Bullock alongside Quinton Aaron and Tim McGraw.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Four sisters are raised by their strong-willed mother while their father is away fighting in the American Civil War. Although one yearns to become a writer and another dreams of being married, the girls remain firmly united as the family steers a course through hard times and tragic events. Period drama, based on Louisa May Alcott's novel, with Winona Ryder, Susan Sarandon, Claire Danes, Samantha Mathis and Kirsten Dunst.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: A single man gets the chance to turn his unhappy life around when his father reveals that they both have the ability to travel through time and change their personal history. He uses his newfound talent to try to improve his love life and win the heart of an American woman he has fallen for. Romantic fantasy comedy, with Domhnall Gleeson, Rachel McAdams and Bill Nighy.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: Queen Elizabeth I faces threats at home and abroad, as Mary, Queen of Scots plots against her while the King of Spain builds a vast armada to undertake an invasion of England. Unable to reconcile her feelings for the dashing Sir Walter Raleigh with her duty to her country, the monarch engineers a romance between the courtier and one of her ladies-in-waiting. Historical drama sequel, with Cate Blanchett, Clive Owen, Geoffrey Rush and Samantha Morton.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Rachel Marron, a famous singer and actress is subjected to death threats by an obsessive fan and persuaded to hire a former secret service agent as her bodyguard. However, neither she or her new minder realise the effect they are about to have on each other's lives. Romantic thriller directed by Mick Jackson, starring Kevin Costner, Whitney Houston, Gary Kemp and Bill Cobbs.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Four sisters are raised by their strong-willed mother while their father is away fighting in the American Civil War. Although one yearns to become a writer and another dreams of being married, the girls remain firmly united as the family steers a course through hard times and tragic events. Double Oscar and Bafta-winning period drama, starring Gary Oldman, Lily James and Kristin Scott Thomas.

programme.title: Dunkirk
programme.desc: Allied soldiers from Belgium, the British Empire and France are surrounded by the German army, and face a tense wait for evacuation, during a fierce battle in northern France during the Second World War. Christopher Nolan's wartime drama, which he wrote, directed and produced, starring Kenneth Branagh, Tom Hardy, Mark Rylance and Fionn Whitehead.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: A Navy recruit undergoing officer training has an uneasy romance with a factory worker. He also attracts the attention of a tough, uncompromising sergeant, who sees his potential and is determined to push him to the limit. programme.title: The Brutalist

programme.title: The Cinema List: Risky Romance
programme.desc: From killers and zombies to forbidden love and dangerous desires, The Cinema List explores romances where passion courts danger and love is always worth the risk.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: An idealistic sports agent produces a mission statement at work promising to treat clients fairly. Unfortunately, it costs him his job. Forced to set up an agency on his own, the only people prepared to stand by him are a lovelorn staff accountant and a footballer. Cameron Crowe's romantic comedy drama, with Tom Cruise, Renee Zellweger, Kelly Preston, Jonathan Lipnicki, and Cuba Gooding Jr, who won an Oscar for his performance.(n)

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: Queen Elizabeth I faces threats at home and abroad, as Mary, Queen of Scots plots against her while the King of Spain builds a vast armada to undertake an invasion of England. Unable to reconcile her feelings for the dashing Sir Walter Raleigh with her duty to her country, the monarch engineers a romance between the courtier and one of her ladies-in-waiting. Historical drama sequel, with Cate Blanchett, Clive Owen, Geoffrey Rush and Samantha Morton.(n)

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: A Navy recruit undergoing officer training has an uneasy romance with a factory worker. He also attracts the attention of a tough, uncompromising sergeant, who sees his potential and is determined to push him to the limit. Romantic drama, starring Richard Gere, Debra Winger, Louis Gossett Jr, Robert Loggia, David Keith and David Caruso.(n)

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Rachel Marron, a famous singer and actress is subjected to death threats by an obsessive fan and persuaded to hire a former secret service agent as her bodyguard. However, neither she or her new minder realise the effect they are about to have on each other's lives. Romantic thriller directed by Mick Jackson, starring Kevin Costner, Whitney Houston, Gary Kemp and Bill Cobbs.(n)

programme.title: Boy Meets Boy
programme.desc: When two young men cross paths in Berlin, a simple afternoon in the big city soon takes on a much greater meaning. Drama, starring Matthew Morrison and Alexandros Koutsoulis.(n)

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. During a depressing night in the hotel bar, he meets a spirited younger woman and the pair strike up a close friendship, exploring Tokyo and helping each other face the mundanities of everyday life. Sofia Coppola's comedy drama, starring Bill Murray, Scarlett Johansson and Giovanni Ribisi.(n)

programme.title: Dunkirk
programme.desc: Allied soldiers from Belgium, the British Empire and France are surrounded by the German army, and face a tense wait for evacuation, during a fierce battle in northern France during the Second World War. Christopher Nolan's wartime drama, which he wrote, directed and produced, starring Kenneth Branagh, Tom Hardy, Mark Rylance and Fionn Whitehead.(n)

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: An idealistic sports agent produces a mission statement at work promising to treat clients fairly. Unfortunately, it costs him his job. Forced to set up an agency on his own, the only people prepared to stand by him are a lovelorn staff accountant and a footballer. Cameron Crowe's romantic comedy drama, with Tom Cruise, Renee Zellweger, Kelly Preston, Jonathan Lipnicki, and Cuba Gooding Jr, who won an Oscar for his performance.(n)

programme.title: Jackie
programme.desc: Following the assassination of her husband, President John F Kennedy, Jacqueline Kennedy battles with grief and trauma to regain her faith, console her children, and define JFK's legacy. Director Pablo Larrain's Bafta-winning drama, starring Natalie Portman, Peter Sarsgaard and Greta Gerwig. Mica Levi provided the Oscar-nominated score.(n)

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Following a gig, fading music star Jackson Maine happens upon Ally, a nightclub singer-songwriter. Their instant chemistry leads to a tempestuous romance as he helps her on the road to stardom. However, Jackson's alcoholism has explosive repercussions as her career blossoms. Oscar-winning drama, starring Lady Gaga, Bradley Cooper, who also directed, and Sam Elliott.(n)

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: A woman supports her daughter despite their differences over three tumultuous decades. The indomitable matriarch disapproves of her daughter's marriage and finds grandmotherhood hard to get used to, but is fiercely protective of her family when tragedy strikes. Oscar-winning drama, starring Shirley MacLaine, Debra Winger, Jack Nicholson, Danny DeVito and Jeff Daniels.(n)

programme.title: Joker: Folie a Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck meets the love of his life, Harleen 'Lee' Quinzel, while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Musical thriller, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Lady Gaga and Brendan Gleeson.(n)

programme.title: Boy Meets Boy
programme.desc: When two young men cross paths in Berlin, a simple afternoon in the big city soon takes on a much greater meaning. Drama, starring Matthew Morrison and Alexandros Koutsoulis.(n)

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, where Vikings and dragons have been enemies for generations, young warrior Hiccup breaks tradition by forming an unlikely bond with Toothless, a feared Night Fury. Live action fantasy adventure, starring Mason Thames, Nico Parker and Gerard Butler.(n)

programme.title: Plainclothes
programme.desc: An undercover agent assigned to lure and arrest gay men defies orders when he falls for a target. Writer/director Carmen Emmi's thriller, starring Tom Blyth, Russell Tovey and Maria Dizzia.(n)

programme.title: M3GAN 2.0
programme.desc: Two years following M3GAN's rampage, her creator, Gemma, resorts to resurrecting her infamous creation in order to take down Amelia, the military-grade weapon built by a defense contractor who stole M3GAN's underlying tech, which has turned on its creators. Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Violet McGraw, Jemaine Clement and Allison Williams.(n)

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth
programme.desc: Profit-hungry pharmaceutical representative Martin Krebs contracts covert operations specialist Zora Bennett to assemble a crack team to infiltrate a forbidden island and collect the DNA of three key dinosaur species. Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey.(n)

programme.title: One More Shot
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve 1999, a young woman discovers a bottle of time-travelling tequila, and each shot takes her back to the start of the night. Comedy, starring Emily Browning, Aisha Dee and Sean Keenan.(n)

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: A group of friends are terrorised by a stalker who knows about a gruesome secret from their past. Horror reboot, starring Madelyn Cline and Chase Sui Wonders.(n)

programme.title: Bring Her Back
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. Hoever, when events inside Laura's home spiral out of control, Andy fears he is losing his mind. Thriller, starring Billy Barratt, Sora Wong and Sally Hawkins.(n)

programme.title: Bone Lake
programme.desc: A couple's holiday is upended when they're forced to share a mansion with a mysterious couple, spiralling into a maze of sex, lies and manipulation. Comedy thriller, starring Alex Roe and Maddie Hasson.(n)

programme.title: The Gentleman
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman, haunted by a brutal murder, embarks on a quest for vengeance, navigating a complex web of emotions and moral dilemmas. Thriller, starring Ron Perlman.(n)

programme.title: The Effect: Bad Bunny
programme.desc: Dive into the world of Bad Bunny; from his Puerto Rican roots and genre-defying sound to a historic home-grown residency, this documentary reveals the authenticity and impact of Benito's music and message.","large":"Dive into the world of Bad Bunny - the unstoppable force reshaping music, culture, and global entertainment; from his Puerto Rican roots and genre-defying sound to a historic homegrown residency and record-breaking rise to the top of the charts; featuring the industry's top tastemakers, his documentary reveals the authenticity and impact of Benito's music and message. Just in time for his 2026 Super Bowl performance, the world is watching to see what Bad Bunny will do next.(c)

From Dusk Till Dawn 3: The Hangman's Daughter
programme.desc: Set in Mexico in the early 1900s, this action-packed movie tells of the birth of vampire princess Santanico Pandemonium.

programme.title: Critters
programme.desc: A group of small but vicious alien creatures called Crites escape from an alien prison transport vessel and lands near a small farm town on Earth.

programme.title: Wolf Man
programme.desc: A family is attacked by an unseen animal, but as the night stretches on, the father begins to transform into something unrecognizable.

programme.title: Until Dawn
programme.desc: After her sister disappeared, Clover and her friends head to where she vanished to search for answers. They soon encounter a masked killer who murders them one by one.

programme.title: The Nun
programme.desc: A troubled priest and a novice nun battle a malevolent force when they're sent to investigate the apparent suicide of a Romanian nun.

programme.title: Annabelle
programme.desc: In this creepy prequel to hit horror The Conjuring, a married couple are tormented by a doll that has been possessed by an evil spirit.

programme.title: Annabelle: Creation
programme.desc: Young orphan Linda finds herself drawn to a creepy porcelain doll that seems to have evil in its cold, dead eyes... Horror.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last...
programme.desc: A group of friends are terrorised by a stalker who knows about their gruesome secret from their past. With Madelyn Cline. Language/violence/sex.

programme.desc: Two years after M3GAN's rampage, her creator, Gemma, resorts to resurrecting her infamous creation to take down Amelia, a military-grade weapon.

programme.desc: A kindly farmer wins a cute piglet, which some greedy humans and jealous animals hope will end up as the Christmas roast. programme.title: The Witches
programme.desc: A boy goes on holiday with his grandmother to a seaside hotel hosting a convention of witches, who have come together to hear their leader's plan to turn all the children in England into mice. Children's fantasy directed by Nicolas Roeg, based on the book by Roald Dahl, and

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: A mischievous rabbit has the run of a farm and its vegetable patch when the owner unexpectedly dies. When a relative inherits the property, he strives to rid his land of the rabbit and his woodland friends - but his feelings for a nature-loving woman complicate the battle of wits with the animal kingdom. Family comedy based on Beatrix Potter's stories, starring Domhnall Gleeson and Rose Byrne, wit

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: When Papa Smurf is taken by evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel, Smurfette leads her fellow blue creatures on a mission to the real world to save him. Live-action animated musical fantasy comedy, featuring the voices of Rihanna, James Corden and Nick Offerman.

programme.title: The Golden Compass
programme.desc: Orphan Lyra Belacqua lives in a parallel universe populated by magical and menacing characters. When her best friend becomes the latest in a long line of children to mysteriously vanish, she embarks on a perilous mission to uncover the dark secret behind their disappearance. Fantasy adventure based on Philip Pullman's novel Northern Lights, starring Dakota Blue Richards, Nicole Kidman, Daniel Crai

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Penniless Charlie Bucket is one of five lucky children who find a golden ticket in a chocolate bar, winning a once-in-a-lifetime tour of eccentric recluse Willy Wonka's magical sweet company. Unfortunately, the other winners each face a grim fate when they start to misbehave. Tim Burton's children's fantasy, based on Roald Dahl's novel, starring Johnny Depp, Freddie Highmore, Helena Bonham Carter,

programme.title: The Ant Bully
programme.desc: A friendless, moody 10-year-old spends his free time terrorising ants - until the tiny creatures take their revenge by magically reducing him to their own size and forcing him to learn how to contribute to colony life. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Julia Roberts, Nicolas Cage, Meryl Streep and Paul Giamatti.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Following a shipwreck, a robot called Roz survives on an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals. Family animation, with the voices of Lupita Nyong'o, Pedro Pascal, Kit Connor and Bill Nighy.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: An American couple decide their son needs a brother, and plan to adopt another child - but when they get to the orphanage they are greeted by a charming talking mouse named Stuart, who fits the bill perfectly. Family comedy, based on Louise Fitzhugh's novel, starring Michelle Trachtenberg, Vanessa Lee Chester, Gregory Smith and Rosie O'Donnell.

programme.title: The Wizard of Oz
programme.desc: Youngster Dorothy Gale is whisked over the rainbow by a tornado into the magical land of Oz, where she inadvertently kills a wicked witch - incurring the wrath of another. Musical fantasy, with Judy Garland, Ray Bolge

programme.title: A Dog's Purpose
programme.desc: A dog is reincarnated as different breeds over several generations, with multiple owners and with a variety of names, but he is fated to be reacquainted, decades later, with his original owner. Comedy drama, starring Dennis Quaid, with the voice of Josh Gad.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: Anti-social ogre Shrek resolves to stop an evil ruler from banishing fairy-tale characters to his swampland home. However, the reluctant hero ends up forced to rescue the beautiful Princess Fiona from a castle guarded by a dragon, aided only by a wisecracking donkey. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, John Lithgow, Cameron Diaz, Eddie Murphy and Vincent Cassel.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Meanwhile, Gandalf the wizard investigates the rise of Necromancer, a mysterious dark power residing in Dol Guldur with the ability to summon the spirits of the dead. Part two of P

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: Dwarf king Thorin reclaims control of his homeland, but his descent into madness places him on the brink of war with his human and elven allies. As Thorin's Hobbit friend Bilbo tries to save the tormented ruler from himself, a vast horde of orcs gathers to destroy them all. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Martin Freeman, Richard Armitage, Ian McKellen, Luke Evans and Orlando

programme.desc: Green-skinned Elphaba Thropp becomes part of the new intake at Shiz University, and shares a room with fellow spell-caster Galinda Upland. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, John Lithgow, Cameron Diaz, Eddie Murphy and Vincent Cassel.

programme.desc: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. programme.title: Edge of the Earth

programme.title: Olive Kitteridge
programme.desc: Henry Kitteridge hires a new assistant at his pharmacy; Olive and a fellow teacher give a shy student a ride home; Henry goes on a hunting trip; Olive experiences a tragedy.

programme.title: Olive Kitteridge
programme.desc: Kevin returns to Maine on a dark mission; Olive invites Kevin to stay with her; Olive has a disagreement with the bride's mother at Christopher's wedding.

programme.title: Olive Kitteridge
programme.desc: After a dinner with friends, Olive and Henry make a pit stop that takes a chilling turn; Christopher suggests that his parents should get counseling; Christopher confronts his mother about rebuking him throughout his childhood.

programme.title: Olive Kitteridge
programme.desc: Olive goes to New York to visit Christopher, but is put off by his wife's demeanor; Olive receives bad news about Henry; Olive and Jack Kennison develop an unlikely bond.

programme.title: Brick Mansions

programme.title: V for Vendetta
programme.desc: Following world war, London is a police state occupied by a fascist government, and a vigilante known only as V (Hugo Weaving) uses terrorist tactics to fight the oppressors of the world in which he now lives. After a catastrophic crash on an unknown planet, pilot Mills quickly discovers he's actually stranded on Earth -- 65 million years ago. Now, with only one chance at a rescue, Mills and the only other survivor, Koa, must make their way across an unknown terrain riddled with dangerous prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: The Great Lillian Hall
programme.desc: Broadway actress Lillian Hall pours her heart and soul into preparing for her next big role but finds herself blindsided by confusion and forgetfulness. She strives to make it to opening night while holding on to her fading memories and identity.

programme.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
programme.desc: After months have passed without a culprit in her daughter's murder case, Mildred Hayes makes a bold move, painting three signs leading into her town with a controversial message directed at William Willoughby, the town's revered chief of police. programme.title: While We're Young
programme.desc: Middle-aged filmmaker Josh Srebnick (Ben Stiller) and his wife, Cornelia (Naomi Watts), are happily married, but stuck in a rut. So, when free-spirited couple Jamie (Adam Driver) and Darby (Amanda Seyfried) enter their lives, it's like a breath of fresh air -- especially for Josh, who pines for a youth he wishes he had. Soon, Josh and Cornelia are ditching friends their own age to hang out with th

programme.title: My Cousin Rachel
programme.desc: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back he

programme.title: X-Men: First Class
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, during the height of the Cold War, a mutant named Charles Xavier (James McAvoy) meets a fellow mutant named Erik Lehnsherr (Michael Fassbender). Despite their vastly different backgrounds -- Charles grew up with a wealthy family, while Erik lost his parents at Auschwitz -- the two become close friends. As the world teeters on the brink of a nuclear war, Charles and Erik with ot

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

programme.title: The Dark Money Game
programme.desc: A political lobbyist is found shot to death; his apparent suicide highlights a turn in Ohio's largest public corruption case; the case gets uncovered by federal investigators and was nearly concealed by loose super PAC campaign financing rules.

programme.title: The Dark Money Game
programme.desc: Tracing the tangled history of campaign finance back to the creation of the Federal Election Commission (FEC) in 1975, the 2002 McCain-Feingold Campaign Finance Reform Bill, and the Citizens United decision of 2010.

programme.title: Murder in Glitterball City
programme.desc: The body of James Carroll, a gifted hairdresser and drag performer, is discovered. Details are shared of Banis's and Mundt's relationship, revealing both men as complex suspects. Mundt's testimony against his former lover Banis is damning.

programme.title: Murder in Glitterball City
programme.desc: After Joey Banis is found guilty of the murder of James Carroll, the trial of Jeffrey Mundt begins. Joey Banis's video "confession" is scrutinized and allegedly staged by Mundt. The second trial concludes with a stunning outcome.

programme.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
programme.desc: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programme.desc: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.
